U. D. CASE JUDGE JEROME BENSON, RPTR. C. GALLAGHER, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. IN PRO PER ATTY. FOR DEFT. IN PRO PER 9AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. PLTF. SWORN. EXH. #1, LEASE, ID&EV. EXH. 2, 3 DAY NOTICE. DEFT. S&E. DEFT. EXH. #3, 17 PHOTOS, ID&EV. X-EXAM. JEFF ALLEN DAVIS, PLTF. WITS, S&E. DEFT. EXH. #4, LETTER OF ROXANE MCMAHAN. PLTF. REBUTTAL. PLTF. EXAMINES DEFT. PLTF. CLOSING STATEMENT. RECESS UNTIL 2PM. 2PM COURT RECONVENES. PLTF. REBUTTAL WITNESS, MANUEL URBAN, S&E. COURT EXAMINES. X-EXAMINE. PLTF. CLOSING STATEMENT. DEFT. CLOSING STAEMENT. EXH. 2 & 3 ID & EV. PLTF. REBUTTAL STATEMENT. EXH. 4, ID & EV. PER DIEM FEE RECEIPT #1A12P113 DPA AT $180.00. JUDGMNT. FOR DEFT. AGAINST PLTF. DEFT. TO PAY PLTF. $626.96. WITHIN 5 DAYS OF RECORDING JUDGMNT.OTHERWISE PLTF. TO HAVE RESTITUTION OF PREMISES ON EXPARTE MOTION. FORFEITURE OF LEASE. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTY THAT SUBMITED THEM. COURT ADJOURNS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT JOHN MCMAHON AND ROXANE MCMAHON AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH, PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANT JOHN MCMAHON AND ROXANE MCMAHON PAY TO PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH THE SUM OF $626.96 ON OR BEFORE 5 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. NOTE THAT JUDGMENT REFLECTS A 5% REDUCTION OF RENT AND DAMAGES DUE TO THE UNINHABITAABILITY OF THE PREMISES. IN THE EVENT THAT JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $626.96 IS NOT PAID TO PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH, BY DEFENDANT JOHN MCMAHON, WITHIN FIVE DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT, THEN JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 450 JONES, #508, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, AND DAMAGES FOR THE SUM OF $626.96, COSTS OF SUIT, AND FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO PLAINTIFF T. M. KARAH
